name: Blumgi Paintball
author: Poki
description: Get ready for a colorful battle in Blumgi Paintball! In this team-versus-team action platformer, you have to paint the arena in your color. If a large enough part of the arena is yours - you win! You can paint by walking over tiles, using bombs, shooting guns and by using powerful skills. The more matches you win, the higher you'll climb in the rankings. See if you can make it all the way up to Diamond Rank! Winning matches also unlocks fun hats and faces that will really make your character stand out. Got a friend nearby? Play together or against each other in 2 Player Co-op or Versus! Do you have what it takes to become the paintball master? How to play Blumgi Paintball? Use WAD, the arrow keys or the buttons to move around! Use S, the down arrow keys or the buttons to use a bomb! Who created Blumgi Paintball? Blumgi Paintball was created by Blumgi. Play their other games on Poki: Blumgi Ball , Blumgi Soccer and Blumgi Racers How can I play Blumgi Paintball for free? You can play Blumgi Paintball for free on Poki. Can I play Blumgi Paintball on mobile devices and desktop? Blumgi Paintball can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Blumgi Paintball with my friend? Yes! Blumgi Paintball is a local multiplayer game so you can play with your friend at the same computer!
